results.test: live messaging: admin sends to user realtime
results.expected: User receives without waiting full poll interval when websocket healthy
results.actual: User saw admin message in messages thread.

results.test: live messaging: user sends to admin delivery
results.actual: Admin inbox displayed the user message.

results.test: live messaging: websocket unhealthy polling fallback
results.expected: Message arrives via polling fallback within expected interval (~8s + render)
results.actual: Message arrived while websocket bootstrap was blocked.

results.test: live messaging: unread/read state after view
results.expected: Read indicator appears for user message after admin view/mark read

results.test: admin inbox: rapid thread switching / stale overwrite
steps: Rapidly switch between two user items
results.expected: Final selected thread remains active; no stale overwrite from prior request
results.actual: Fallback model confirmed final thread correctness (expectedThread=13, postedThread=13).

results.test: admin inbox: controls disabled while unresolved
steps: Before selecting ready thread inspect send button
results.expected: Send remains blocked until active thread ready
results.actual: Send button disabled in unresolved state.
